emails.subject: Re: ABB Change Order
emails.body: Re: ABB Change Order You may have told me the answer to this already, but is there a spreadsheet for the transformers similar to what we have for the turbines? Thanks, Kay PS Herman and I are swapping voice mails about scheduling something today. Kay From: Rebecca Walker 12/08/2000 10:30 AM
